comments: Approved. The contract scope is correctly bounded to incremental M2 delivery: it explicitly requires creation of src/mcp-server/src/worktree-manager.ts and limits implementation to async wrappers for git worktree add, git commit, git push, and git worktree remove, exported for future M3 consumption. The out_of_scope section correctly forbids implementing the MCP Filesystem Proxy (M3) and explicitly forbids modifying src/mcp-server/src/index.ts, which preserves the intended phased rollout and prevents premature interception of active MCP file-path behavior. Allowed files and stop conditions are also aligned with that boundary. Minor note: allowed_artifacts/required_outputs do not list this review decision artifact, but that omission does not weaken the implementation boundary being reviewed.
